title: asterocephalus sylvaticus
intro: Asterocephalus sylvaticus, also known as the wood betony or woodland betony, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Asterocephalus sylvaticus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
